summary: Thank-you/download page offering three free Cavallo books: Hoof Prints on the Journey, No Horseshoes in Heaven, and the Cavallo Barefoot Trim Manual by Lynn Seeley.
Single-video page showing how to measure and fit Cavallo hoof boots, with an embedded YouTube tutorial.
Promotional page offering 15% off Cavallo boots, citing Western Kentucky University research that Cavallo Trek boots reduce hoof pressure versus metal shoes.
Cavallo Gives charity page documenting the donation of 1000 pairs of hoof boots to rescues, therapy organizations, mounted police, and horses in need worldwide.
Informational page explaining how Cavallo hoof boots help horses with laminitis, navicular, abscesses, and other hoof conditions during therapy, rehab, and turnout.
Cavallo exchange and return policy detailing pre-authorization requirements, sizing exchange steps, return shipping costs, and as-new condition rules.
primary_cta: Contact us to arrange a return

summary: Download page offering a free Laminitis Guide on using Cavallo boots for laminitis recovery and hoof rehabilitation, with real owner stories.
Placeholder teaser page for the upcoming Cavallo Affiliate/Referral Program, announcing something new coming soon.
Celebrities Speak Out page featuring video testimonials from horse experts like Pat Parelli, Monty Roberts, John Lyons, Guy McLean, and Dr. Jennifer Gill endorsing Cavallo boots.
Testimonial page profiling Australian world champion Dan James of Double Dan Horsemanship and why he uses Cavallo Trek boots for trainer's challenges and shows.
Informational guide on Cavallo Pastern Wraps: when to use them, sizing and fitting, application, and pastern/heel-bulb protection for full-time boot wear and conditions like laminitis.
Article on the Western Kentucky University study by Dr. Jennifer Gill comparing Cavallo Trek hoof boots to metal shoes, using FujiFilm pressure imaging to show reduced hoof pressure.
